titleParts.glossary: A place where people who have applied for asylum are accommodated. An asylum shelter can be temporary. A permanent asylum shelter is called an asylum seekers' centre (azc).

titleParts.text: in onze gemeente moet zo snel mogelijk sluiten.

statements.title: Vacant offices should be converted into housing with subsidies from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Money the government gives to citizens, businesses, and organizations to support them.

titleParts.text: van de gemeente worden omgebouwd tot woningen.

statements.title: Paid parking in Dordrecht should become cheaper.
Bulky waste must be collected from homes free of charge.
Cafés and restaurants must be able to determine their own opening hours.
Residents should be able to take over the management of a sports hall from the municipality.
The municipality should designate more parking spaces as charging points for electric cars.
People who need care should always be able to choose a caregiver who matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben, moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: Every primary school child should be able to receive music lessons subsidized by the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Money the government gives to citizens, businesses, and organizations to support them.

titleParts.text: van de gemeente muziekles kunnen krijgen.

statements.title: The municipality should allow housing development in the polder.
Dordrecht should run a pilot project for basic income.

titleParts.text: Dordrecht moet een proef doen met

titleParts.glossary: With a basic income, people receive a fixed amount per month from the government. They do not have to apply for jobs or perform socially useful work in return for the money.

statements.title: The BOAs who check safety in Dordrecht should be given a baton.

titleParts.glossary: Special Enforcement Officers. They can issue fines and often supervise the streets.

titleParts.text: die in Dordrecht controleren op veiligheid moeten een wapenstok krijgen.

statements.title: Dordrecht should contribute to the cost of a new stadium for FC Dordrecht.
Business parks in Dordrecht should be allowed to expand.
The municipality should expand the car‑free zone in Dordrecht city center.
People receiving social assistance should, in return, do socially useful work.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.
For example cleaning the streets or keeping company and supporting elderly residents.

statements.title: All residents of Dordrecht must separate their waste before it is collected.
At least 30% of newly built homes in Dordrecht should be social rental housing. Currently, 28% of homes in the Netherlands are social rental housing.

titleParts.text: Van de nieuw te bouwen woningen in Dordrecht moet minimaal 30% een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

titleParts.text: zijn. In Nederland is nu 28% van de woningen een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: There should be more parking spaces in the neighborhoods.
The coffeeshops should move from the city center to an industrial area.

titleParts.glossary: Shops or cafés where you can buy and smoke soft drugs (hash, weed).

titleParts.text: moeten van de binnenstad naar industrieterrein verhuizen.

statements.title: The municipality should ban solar panels on agricultural land.
The municipality must continue to give refugees with a residence permit priority for social housing.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet vluchtelingen met een

titleParts.glossary: The right to reside in the Netherlands. The term can refer to the right itself or to the card that shows someone has that right.
A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: The municipality should stop forgiving municipal taxes for low-income residents.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet stoppen met het

titleParts.glossary: That people no longer have to pay for something.
Taxes you have to pay to the municipality (e.g., sewer charge, waste disposal charge, dog tax).

titleParts.text: voor inwoners met een laag inkomen.

statements.title: Bus transport in Dordrecht should again be free for people aged 65 and over.
